items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Ekes Out Gain; Nasdaq Comes Off Lows While Palantir Retakes Key Level After 15% Plunge
items.description: Other major indexes remained in the red in a session where investors saw division amongst monetary policymakers in the minutes of the Federal Reserve's July meeting.  Several retail stocks moved on earnings, while Palantir Technologies managed to retake a key level on the stock market today after falling more than 15%.  Meanwhile, investors awaited a speech from Fed Chairman Jerome Powell.

items.title: Travelers Companies Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
items.description: Travelers Companies has notably outperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain moderately bullish on the stock’s prospects.
